attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,WI.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT      
,WI.BK_SR_TAC_WORK_THEATER_CD   
,WI.TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT
,WI.TAC_WARRANTY_PCT
,MAX_SL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DV_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,CASE WHEN DFLT.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY IS NOT NULL  THEN PID.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE -999 END AS DV_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
,PID.SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST WI
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
								FROM (SELECT MT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,NF.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT,MT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
													SUM(MT.TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT+MT.TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT+MT.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT+MT.TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT) AS TOTAL_TAC_COST
													FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_SR_TAC_COST_MEASURE MT
													INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST NF
													ON (NF.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY=MT.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
															AND NF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=MT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT)
													WHERE NF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  in (select FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT from $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)  
													GROUP BY 1,2,3) A  
								QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT ORDER BY TOTAL_TAC_COST DESC)=1) MAX_SL
ON (MAX_SL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND MAX_SL.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT=WI.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT)
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY
 							  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_SR_TAC_COST_MEASURE
 							  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  in (select FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT from $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)  
							  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) PID
ON PID.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY=WI.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
AND PID.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
LEFT JOIN  (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY  
							FROM (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
 												FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_SR_TAC_COST_MEASURE
 												WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  in (select FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT from $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)  
 												GROUP BY 1,2,3) A  
 						GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY)=1) DFLT
ON DFLT.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY=WI.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
AND DFLT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  in (select FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT from $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)  
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8

SELECT 
CAST(WI.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT*100+WI.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT AS INTEGER) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,WI.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT
,OREPLACE(WI.BK_SR_TAC_WORK_THEATER_CD,'GLOBAL_TAC','GTC') AS BK_SR_TAC_WORK_THEATER_CD
,WI.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME
,WI.SRC_RPTD_PRDT_FAMILY_ID
,WI.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
,WI.C3_CUST_THEATER_NAME
,WI.C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME
,NSR.SR_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY
,SUM(WI.TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT) BB_COST 
,SUM(WI.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT) OT_COST
,SUM(WI.TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT)  OH_COST
,SUM(WI.TAC_THEATER_BUSI_OPERATIONS_COST_USD_AMT) TBO_COST
,SUM(WI.RMA_CASE_WEIGHT_PCT) AS RMA_CASE_WEIGHT
FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECHNI_ASSIST_CENTER_COST WI
LEFT JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SERVICE_REQUEST NSR
ON NSR.BK_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT=WI.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT
WHERE 
--BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT IN (2017,2018)
CAST(WI.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT*100+WI.BK_SR_TAC_COST_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT AS INTEGER) IN (select FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT from $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL) 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9

SELECT 
 TS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
,TS.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT       
,TS.BK_SR_TAC_WORK_THEATER_CD     
,CASE WHEN TS.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME='DIRECT' THEN 'BB' 
	  WHEN TS.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME='OUTSOURCER' THEN 'OT' 
	  ELSE COALESCE(TS.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME,'UNK')
 END AS DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME
,COALESCE(FN.SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY,-999) AS SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY
,COALESCE(FN.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,-999) AS DV_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
,COALESCE(TS.SRC_RPTD_PRDT_FAMILY_ID,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(FN.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS DV_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,COALESCE(TS.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(TS.SR_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999)
,COALESCE(TS.C3_CUST_THEATER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(TS.C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(TS.RMA_CASE_WEIGHT,0.00) AS RMA_CASE_WEIGHT_PCT                  
,CASE WHEN DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME IN ('DIRECT','BB','UNKNOWN') THEN TS.OT_COST ELSE 0.00 END AS TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT
,CASE WHEN DELIVERY_CHANNEL_NAME IN ('OUTSOURCER','OT') THEN TS.OT_COST  ELSE 0.00 END AS TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT      
,TS.OH_COST AS TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT     
,TS.TBO_COST AS TAC_THEATER_BUSI_OPERATIONS_COST_USD_AMT
,FN_PCT.TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT     
,FN_PCT.TAC_WARRANTY_PCT   
,USER          
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_TAC_COST_TS_OPS TS
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TSS_TAC_COST_FIN FN
ON FN.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=TS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND FN.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT=TS.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_REQUEST_NUM_INT
AND FN.BK_SR_TAC_WORK_THEATER_CD=TS.BK_SR_TAC_WORK_THEATER_CD
INNER JOIN (SELECT  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT,TAC_WARRANTY_PCT
								FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_TAC_COST_FIN GROUP BY 1,2,3) FN_PCT
ON FN_PCT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=TS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
